title: Mythical Network Cobblemon
description: Mythical Network is a Fabric Minecraft server that brings Pokemon to Minecraft with a ton of custom features!
body:
Mythical Network Cobblemon Pack

This modpack is crafted specifically for Mythical Network, optimized for performance and quality-of-life improvements to create a smooth, immersive experience — even on lower-end machines.

Recommended RAM: 4GB
Cobblemon Version: Snapshot build of v1.6
Key Features:

    Regions Mode:
    Explore a massive, interconnected world with synced servers where hundreds of players can build, explore, and progress together. Seamlessly travel across biomes and experience a shared multiplayer adventure like no other.

    Pokedex Overhaul:
    Complete custom Pokédex entries with unique research tasks and expanded info tailored to Mythical Network.

    Special Textures:
    Discover exclusive Pokémon textures that can’t be found anywhere else — all fully collectible in-game.

    Adventure Pass:
    Earn rewards through seasonal objectives and challenges with our custom battlepass system.

    Landmarks:
    Build and upgrade personal landmarks to influence Pokémon spawns in your area.

    Loot Balloons & Expeditions:
    Shoot down wild balloons for instant loot, or send Pokémon on timed expeditions to bring back rewards.

    Mega Evolutions:
    Evolve your Pokémon beyond their limits with full Mega Evolution support.

    Radars & Chaining Combos:
    Use advanced tools to track, chain, and improve your odds for rare Pokémon encounters.

    Daycare & Auction House:
    Breed the perfect Pokémon or trade them on a fully player-run economy system.

    Cosmetics:
    Customize your look with dozens of unlockable outfits, accessories, and more.

    Kanto Region:
    Explore a fully customized Kanto experience, designed from the ground up for Cobblemon.

How to Join:

After launching the pack, go to Multiplayer and connect to:
play.mythicalnetwork.live

Shop: https://shop.mythicalnetwork.com/
Discord: https://discord.gg/mythicalnetwork
